chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision No.D-40 of 2021 Cr. Jail Appeal No.S-102 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on MA No.5401/2021 3. For hearing of main case 18-10-2023 Mr. Sikander Sadar, Associate of Mr.Khan Muhammad Sangi Advocate for Applicant in Cr. R. A.no.D-40/2021 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar Advocate for the Appellants in Cr.Jail Appeal No.D-102/2021 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Cr. Rev. Application No.D-40/2021 is pending since 2021 and the case record shows that neither complainant nor his counsel has ever tried to argue this application. And because of its pendency, Cr. Jail Appeal No.S- 102/2021 otherwise SB matter has been posted before the Divisional Bench for hearing. The respondents are in jail for the last two years but because of failure of counsel to proceed with this revision application, the said appeal has not been heard and decided. Meanwhile applicant compromised with respondents Akbar and Ali Murad, who have been acquitted on the basis of compromise vide order dated 18.04.2022 and this application therefore to their extent has already become infructuous. Insofar as the role of remaining respondents is concerned, they have been jointly held responsible for causing death of deceased Dodo through firearms, the brother of complainant and as per postmortem report all the injuries thus caused have been opined by the Doctor sufficient for causing death of the deceased. Learned DPG is also of the opinion that as per evidence, there is no sufficient material ground to enhance the sentence of life imprisonment of the respondents to death.

Insofar as the role of remaining respondents is concerned, they have been jointly held responsible for causing death of deceased Dodo through firearms, the brother of complainant and as per postmortem report all the injuries thus caused have been opined by the Doctor sufficient for causing death of the deceased. Learned DPG is also of the opinion that as per evidence, there is no sufficient material ground to enhance the sentence of life imprisonment of the respondents to death. Be that as it may, since counsel for the applicant in revision application is absent and learned counsel holding brief on his behalf has failed to proceed with the matter, Cr.Rev.A.No.D-40/2021 is dismissed in non- prosecution. The Cr. Jail Appeal No.S-102/2021 is transmitted to be posted before single bench accordingly. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
